items.title: Sample Project
items.subtitle: React 19, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL
bullets: Built and maintained a continuous integration pipeline spanning multiple repositories and delivering artifacts for authentication, validation, and facility isolation.
Implemented a provider adapter over hosted backends, normalizing model and base-URL configuration, timeouts, and JSON parsing, with a deterministic rewriter fallback.

items.title: Operations Assistant

bullets: Translated recurring scheduling and clinical workflow issues into practical requirements for physicians and staff in a high-volume clinic environment.
